title: Nonprofit Organization Search
description: Search US tax-exempt nonprofit organizations by name or keyword. Returns EIN, name, city, state, and NTEE classification from the IRS Exempt Organizations Business Master File via ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer.
descriptionBazaar: Search US tax-exempt nonprofits by name/keyword. Returns EIN, name, city, state, NTEE code. Keyless ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer backed by IRS data. For agents doing charity due diligence.

title: Nonprofit Organization Profile by EIN
description: Retrieve a full US nonprofit organization profile by EIN (Employer Identification Number). Returns address, subsection code, ruling date, asset/income codes, and recent IRS filing summaries from ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer.
descriptionBazaar: Full US nonprofit profile by EIN: address, subsection code, ruling date, asset and income codes, recent IRS filings. Keyless ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer. For agents auditing tax-exempt orgs.

title: Federal Register Documents by Type
description: List recent US Federal Register documents filtered by type (PRORULE proposed rule, RULE final rule, NOTICE, PRESDOCU presidential document). Returns titles, document numbers, agencies, and publication dates from the official Federal Register API.
descriptionBazaar: Recent US Federal Register documents by type (PRORULE, RULE, NOTICE, PRESDOCU). Returns titles, doc numbers, agencies, publication dates. Keyless Federal Register API. For agents tracking regulations.

title: Federal Register Public Inspection Documents
description: List documents currently on public inspection at the US Federal Register, available before official publication. Returns titles, agencies, document numbers, and filing details from the official Federal Register API.
descriptionBazaar: Documents currently on public inspection at the US Federal Register, ahead of official publication. Returns titles, agencies, doc numbers, filing details. Keyless Federal Register API. For agents tracking pending rules.

title: Federal Register Agency Detail
description: Retrieve details for a single US federal agency by its Federal Register slug. Returns agency name, description, parent and child agencies, and short name from the official Federal Register API.
descriptionBazaar: Single US federal agency detail by slug: name, description, parent/child agencies, short name. Keyless Federal Register API. For agents resolving regulatory authorities.

sampleResponse.name: Environmental Protection Agency
sampleResponse.description: The Environmental Protection Agency protects human health and safeguards the natural environment.

title: Vehicle MPG Model Years
description: List all model years available in the US EPA/DOE FuelEconomy.gov vehicle fuel-economy database. Returns each year as a selectable menu value. Keyless source for building vehicle MPG lookups.
descriptionBazaar: All model years available in the US EPA/DOE FuelEconomy.gov vehicle database. Returns selectable year values. Keyless FuelEconomy.gov. For agents building vehicle MPG and emissions lookups.

title: Vehicle Makes by Year
description: List all vehicle makes available for a given model year in the US EPA/DOE FuelEconomy.gov database. Returns each make as a selectable menu value. Keyless source for vehicle MPG lookups.
descriptionBazaar: All vehicle makes for a given model year from US EPA/DOE FuelEconomy.gov. Returns selectable make values. Keyless FuelEconomy.gov. For agents drilling into vehicle MPG and emissions data.

title: Vehicle Models by Year and Make
description: List all vehicle models for a given model year and make in the US EPA/DOE FuelEconomy.gov database. Returns each model as a selectable menu value. Keyless source for vehicle MPG lookups.
descriptionBazaar: All vehicle models for a given year and make from US EPA/DOE FuelEconomy.gov. Returns selectable model values. Keyless FuelEconomy.gov. For agents narrowing to a specific vehicle for MPG data.

title: Vehicle Fuel Economy Detail
description: Retrieve full fuel-economy details for a specific vehicle by its FuelEconomy.gov vehicle ID. Returns city/highway/combined MPG, CO2 grams per mile, annual fuel cost, fuel type, and powertrain data from the US EPA/DOE.
descriptionBazaar: Full fuel-economy detail for a vehicle by FuelEconomy.gov ID: city/highway/combined MPG, CO2 g/mi, annual fuel cost, fuel type, powertrain. Keyless US EPA/DOE FuelEconomy.gov. For agents scoring vehicle efficiency.

title: Vehicle Emissions Standards
description: Retrieve EPA emissions-standard information for a specific vehicle by its FuelEconomy.gov vehicle ID. Returns emission scores, SmartWay score, sales area, and the federal/California emission standard text.
descriptionBazaar: EPA emissions standards for a vehicle by FuelEconomy.gov ID: emission score, SmartWay score, sales area, federal/California standard text. Keyless US EPA/DOE FuelEconomy.gov. For agents assessing vehicle emissions.

title: Current US Fuel Prices
description: Retrieve current national average US fuel prices used by FuelEconomy.gov for annual fuel-cost estimates. Returns prices for regular, midgrade, premium, diesel, E85, CNG, LPG, and electricity.
descriptionBazaar: Current national-average US fuel prices from FuelEconomy.gov: regular, midgrade, premium, diesel, E85, CNG, LPG, electricity. Keyless US EPA/DOE source. For agents estimating fuel costs.

title: UK Electricity Generation Mix
description: Retrieve the current half-hourly Great Britain electricity generation mix as a percentage by fuel: gas, nuclear, wind, solar, hydro, biomass, coal, and imports. Keyless UK Carbon Intensity API from National Grid ESO.
descriptionBazaar: Current GB electricity generation mix by fuel percentage: gas, nuclear, wind, solar, hydro, biomass, coal, imports. Keyless UK Carbon Intensity API (National Grid ESO). For agents tracking the grid.

title: PC Game Deals
description: Current PC game price deals across major stores (Steam, GreenManGaming, GOG, Fanatical and more), sorted by deal rating. Keyless CheapShark.
descriptionBazaar: Live PC game price deals across major stores: title, sale vs normal price, savings percent, store, Metacritic and Steam rating. Keyless CheapShark. For agents tracking game discounts.

sortBy.description: Sort field: Deal Rating, Title, Savings, Price, Metacritic

title.description: Filter deals by game title substring

title: Game Stores List
description: List of digital PC game stores tracked by CheapShark, with store ID, name, active flag and logo/banner images. Keyless. Use the IDs to filter deals.
descriptionBazaar: Directory of PC game stores tracked by CheapShark with store ID, name, active flag and image assets. Keyless. Useful for mapping store IDs in deal queries.

title: Game Price Search
description: Search games by title and get the cheapest current price plus a deal link for each match. Keyless CheapShark game lookup.
descriptionBazaar: Search PC games by title; returns gameID, Steam app ID, cheapest current price and a cheapest-deal link per match. Keyless CheapShark. For agents pricing a specific game.

title: Free-to-Play Games
description: Browse free-to-play games with title, genre, platform, publisher, developer, short description and release date. Keyless FreeToGame.
descriptionBazaar: Catalog of free-to-play games: title, genre, platform, publisher, developer, short description and release date. Keyless FreeToGame. For agents discovering F2P titles.

title: Free Games by Category
description: List free-to-play games in a specific genre/category such as shooter, mmorpg, strategy, card, racing, fighting or moba. Keyless FreeToGame.
descriptionBazaar: Free-to-play games filtered by genre (shooter, mmorpg, strategy, card, racing, moba, etc) with title, platform, publisher and release date. Keyless FreeToGame.

category.description: Genre/category, e.g. shooter, mmorpg, strategy, card, racing, moba

title: Free Game Detail
description: Full detail for one free-to-play game by FreeToGame ID: long description, status, minimum system requirements, screenshots and publisher. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Detailed info for a single free-to-play game by ID: full description, status, system requirements and screenshots. Keyless FreeToGame. For agents deep-diving one title.

title: Top Anime Ranking
description: Top-ranked anime from MyAnimeList with title, score, rank, popularity, type, episodes and synopsis. Keyless Jikan v4.
descriptionBazaar: Top anime ranked from MyAnimeList: title, score, rank, popularity, type, episode count and synopsis. Keyless Jikan v4. For agents surfacing the best-rated anime.

type.description: Filter by type: tv, movie, ova, special, ona, music

title: Anime Search
description: Search MyAnimeList anime by title; returns matches with score, type, episodes, status, aired dates and synopsis. Keyless Jikan v4.
descriptionBazaar: Search anime by title on MyAnimeList; returns score, type, episodes, status, aired dates and synopsis per match. Keyless Jikan v4. For agents finding an anime by name.

title: Currently Airing Anime
description: Anime airing in the current season with title, type, episodes, score and broadcast info. Keyless Jikan v4 seasons/now.
descriptionBazaar: Anime airing this season from MyAnimeList: title, type, episode count, score and broadcast info. Keyless Jikan v4. For agents tracking what is currently airing.

filter.description: Filter by type: tv, movie, ova, special, ona, music

title: Anime Detail
description: Full detail for one anime by MyAnimeList ID: titles, synopsis, score, ranking, genres, studios, aired dates, episodes and trailer. Keyless Jikan v4.
descriptionBazaar: Complete details for a single anime by MAL ID: titles, synopsis, score, rank, genres, studios, aired dates and episodes. Keyless Jikan v4. For agents enriching one anime.

title: Manga Search
description: Search MyAnimeList manga by title; returns matches with score, chapters, volumes, status, published dates and synopsis. Keyless Jikan v4.
descriptionBazaar: Search manga by title on MyAnimeList; returns score, chapters, volumes, status, published dates and synopsis. Keyless Jikan v4. For agents finding a manga by name.

title: Anime Character Search
description: Search anime/manga characters by name on MyAnimeList; returns character ID, name, nicknames, favorites and image. Keyless Jikan v4.
descriptionBazaar: Search anime and manga characters by name on MyAnimeList; returns character ID, name, nicknames and favorites count. Keyless Jikan v4. For agents looking up a character.

title: Anime Broadcast Schedule
description: Anime broadcast schedule for a given weekday from MyAnimeList, with title, type, score and airing info. Keyless Jikan v4 schedules.
descriptionBazaar: Anime airing schedule by weekday from MyAnimeList: title, type, score and broadcast time. Keyless Jikan v4. For agents building a weekly anime calendar.

title: Driving Route Between Coordinates
description: Fastest driving route between an ordered list of lon,lat coordinates using the public OSRM engine. Returns total distance (meters), duration (seconds), and per-leg breakdown. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Driving route between lon,lat coordinates via public OSRM. Returns distance (m), duration (s), and per-leg legs/waypoints. Keyless OpenStreetMap routing for agents computing travel time and distance.

coords.description: Semicolon-separated lon,lat pairs (at least two), e.g. start;end

title: Snap Coordinate to Nearest Road
description: Snaps a single lon,lat coordinate to the nearest point(s) on the routable road network using the public OSRM nearest service. Returns matched location, road name, and snap distance. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Snap a lon,lat coordinate to the nearest routable road via public OSRM. Returns matched location, road name and snap distance for the closest N points. Keyless OpenStreetMap map-matching for agents.

coord.description: A single lon,lat coordinate to snap

number.description: Number of nearest segments to return

title: Reverse Geocode (BigDataCloud)
description: Reverse-geocodes a latitude/longitude into administrative names: continent, country, principal subdivision (state), city, locality, and postcode. Keyless BigDataCloud client endpoint.
descriptionBazaar: Reverse-geocode lat/lon to country, state, city, locality and postcode via keyless BigDataCloud. Returns ISO codes and admin hierarchy. For agents turning coordinates into human-readable place names.

title: German Postcode Lookup
description: Looks up a German (DE) postal code via Zippopotam and returns the associated place name(s) with latitude, longitude, and state. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Resolve a German (DE) postcode to place name, state, latitude and longitude via keyless Zippopotam. For agents geocoding German addresses by postal code.

title: US Place Lookup by City Name
description: Looks up US postal codes by state and city name via Zippopotam. Returns matching place names with latitude, longitude, and post code. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Resolve a US city by state + name to its postal codes with latitude and longitude via keyless Zippopotam. For agents geocoding US places by name instead of ZIP.

title: Current Time by Timezone
description: Current local date and time for an IANA timezone name via TimeAPI. Returns year, month, day, hour, minute, weekday, DST status, and a full ISO date-time string. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Current local date and time for any IANA timezone (e.g. Europe/Berlin) via keyless TimeAPI. Returns ISO date-time, weekday and DST flag. For agents scheduling across timezones.

title: Current Time by Coordinate
description: Current local date and time at a latitude/longitude via TimeAPI, which resolves the coordinate to its timezone. Returns ISO date-time, weekday, timezone, and DST status. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Current local time at a lat/lon coordinate via keyless TimeAPI (auto-resolves timezone). Returns ISO date-time, weekday, timezone and DST flag. For agents that only have coordinates, not zone names.

title: Current Time by IP Address
description: Current local date and time for the location of an IPv4/IPv6 address via TimeAPI. Returns ISO date-time, weekday, resolved timezone, and DST status. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Current local time for an IP address's location via keyless TimeAPI. Returns ISO date-time, weekday, timezone and DST flag. For agents inferring a user's local time from their IP.

title: List of IANA Timezones
description: Full list of supported IANA timezone identifiers via TimeAPI. Useful for validating or enumerating timezone names. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Complete list of supported IANA timezone identifiers via keyless TimeAPI. For agents validating timezone input or building timezone pickers.

title: IP Geolocation
description: Geolocates an IPv4/IPv6 address via ip-api.com (free non-commercial). Returns country, region, city, zip, latitude/longitude, timezone, ISP, organization, and AS number. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Geolocate an IP address via keyless ip-api.com. Returns country, region, city, zip, lat/lon, timezone, ISP, org and AS number. For agents enriching IPs with location and network owner.

ip.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to geolocate

title: Detect Client Public IP
description: Returns the public IP address of the caller as seen by the upstream, plus whether it is IPv4 or IPv6. Keyless BigDataCloud client-ip endpoint.
descriptionBazaar: Detect the caller's public IP address and type (IPv4/IPv6) via keyless BigDataCloud. For agents discovering their own egress IP.

title: DNS MX Record Lookup
description: Resolves the mail-exchange (MX) records for a domain via Google DNS-over-HTTPS. Returns priority and mail server hostnames. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Resolve a domain's MX (mail server) records via keyless Google DNS-over-HTTPS. Returns priority and mail host data. For agents checking email routing and deliverability.

name.description: Domain name to look up MX records for

title: DNS TXT Record Lookup
description: Resolves the TXT records for a domain via Cloudflare DNS-over-HTTPS. Useful for SPF, DKIM, and domain-verification strings. Keyless.
descriptionBazaar: Resolve a domain's TXT records (SPF, DKIM, verification strings) via keyless Cloudflare DNS-over-HTTPS. For agents auditing email auth and domain ownership records.

name.description: Domain name to look up TXT records for

title: COVID-19 Vaccine Coverage by Country
description: Cumulative COVID-19 vaccine doses administered timeline for a single country over the last N days, sourced from disease.sh aggregating Our World in Data.
descriptionBazaar: COVID-19 vaccine doses administered for one country as a daily cumulative timeline (last N days). Keyless disease.sh / OWID. For agents tracking public-health vaccination coverage.

country.description: Country name, ISO2 or ISO3 code

lastdays.description: Number of trailing days to return (or 'all')

title: COVID-19 Statistics by US State
description: Current COVID-19 case, death, recovery and population statistics for a single US state, sourced from disease.sh aggregating Johns Hopkins / NYT data.
descriptionBazaar: Current COVID-19 cases, deaths, recovered, and per-million rates for one US state. Keyless disease.sh. For agents needing state-level US public-health figures.

title: COVID-19 Statistics for All Countries
description: Current COVID-19 statistics for every country with optional sorting, sourced from disease.sh. Returns one record per country with cases, deaths, tests and per-million rates.
descriptionBazaar: Current COVID-19 stats for all countries (sortable): cases, deaths, recovered, active, tests, and per-million rates with flag and ISO codes. Keyless disease.sh. For agents needing a global country comparison snapshot.

sort.description: Field to sort countries by (cases, deaths, tests, ...)

title: ICD-9-CM Diagnosis Code Search
description: Search ICD-9-CM diagnosis codes by free text term, returning matching codes and descriptions from the NLM Clinical Table Search Service.
descriptionBazaar: Search ICD-9-CM diagnosis codes by free-text term; returns matching codes plus descriptions. Keyless NLM Clinical Tables. For agents mapping clinical terms to legacy ICD-9 diagnosis codes.
sampleResponse: Diabetes mellitus of mother, complicating pregnancy

title: LOINC Lab Test Search
description: Search LOINC laboratory and clinical observation codes by free text term, returning matching LOINC numbers and long common names from the NLM Clinical Table Search Service.
descriptionBazaar: Search LOINC lab and clinical observation codes by free-text term; returns LOINC numbers and long common names. Keyless NLM Clinical Tables. For agents mapping lab tests to standardized LOINC codes.

title: Disease Name Search (UMLS)
description: Search disease and condition names by free text term, returning matching UMLS concept identifiers and display names from the NLM Clinical Table Search Service.
descriptionBazaar: Search disease and condition names by free-text term; returns UMLS concept IDs and display names. Keyless NLM Clinical Tables. For agents normalizing disease terms to UMLS concepts.

title: Medical Procedure Name Search
description: Search common medical procedure names by free text term, returning matching procedure codes and labels from the NLM Clinical Table Search Service.
descriptionBazaar: Search common medical procedure names by free-text term; returns procedure codes and labels. Keyless NLM Clinical Tables. For agents resolving procedure terms to standardized entries.

title: PubMed Literature Search
description: Search PubMed for biomedical literature by query term, returning matching article PMIDs and the total result count via NCBI E-utilities esearch.
descriptionBazaar: Search PubMed biomedical literature by term; returns matching PMIDs and total count. Keyless NCBI E-utilities. For agents discovering biomedical papers and citation IDs.

retmax.description: Max number of PMIDs to return

title: PubMed Article Summary
description: Fetch document summary metadata (title, authors, journal, dates, identifiers) for one or more PubMed PMIDs via NCBI E-utilities esummary.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch PubMed article summary metadata by PMID: title, authors, journal, dates, and identifiers. Keyless NCBI E-utilities. For agents retrieving citation details for papers.

38000000.title: Some present and future ethical dilemmas surrounding advancements in in vitro fertilization.

title: NCBI Gene Summary
description: Fetch gene summary metadata (symbol, description, chromosome, map location, aliases, genomic coordinates) for an NCBI Entrez Gene ID via E-utilities esummary.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch NCBI Gene summary by Entrez Gene ID: official symbol, description, chromosome, map location, aliases, and genomic coordinates. Keyless NCBI E-utilities. For agents resolving gene metadata.

title: NCBI dbSNP Variant Summary
description: Fetch dbSNP variant summary (rs identifier, alleles, global minor allele frequencies across reference studies) for a dbSNP record ID via NCBI E-utilities esummary.
descriptionBazaar: Fetch dbSNP variant summary by rsID number: alleles and global minor allele frequencies across reference studies (1000 Genomes, ExAC, etc.). Keyless NCBI E-utilities. For agents querying SNP frequency data.

title: Ensembl Gene Lookup by Symbol
description: Look up a human gene by HGNC symbol in Ensembl, returning the Ensembl gene ID, biotype, genomic coordinates, strand, assembly and description.
descriptionBazaar: Look up a human gene by HGNC symbol in Ensembl; returns Ensembl gene ID, biotype, chromosome, coordinates, strand, and assembly. Keyless Ensembl REST. For agents resolving gene symbols to genomic annotations.

title: Ensembl Gene Phenotype Associations
description: Retrieve phenotype and disease associations for a human gene by symbol from Ensembl, returning descriptions, ontology accessions and source annotations.
descriptionBazaar: Retrieve phenotype and disease associations for a human gene by symbol from Ensembl: condition descriptions, ontology accessions (EFO/MONDO/HP), and sources. Keyless Ensembl REST. For agents mapping genes to disease phenotypes.

title: Wikipedia Page Media List
description: List of media (images, audio, video) used on an English Wikipedia article by title via the Wikimedia REST API, no key. Returns each item with type, title, and source URLs at multiple resolutions. For AI agents enriching entities with imagery and media references.
descriptionBazaar: Media items (images, audio, video) on an English Wikipedia article by title via the Wikimedia REST API, no key. Each item has type, title, and source URLs at multiple resolutions. For agents enriching entities with imagery.

title: Wikipedia Featured Content By Date
description: Wikipedia featured content for a given date via the Wikimedia REST API, no key. Returns the featured article of the day, most-read pages, picture of the day, news, and on-this-day events. For AI agents building daily digests and trivia.
descriptionBazaar: Wikipedia featured content for a date via the Wikimedia REST API, no key. Returns the featured article of the day, most-read pages, picture of the day, news, and on-this-day events. For agents building daily digests.

title: Wikipedia Article Daily Pageviews
description: Daily pageview counts for a single English Wikipedia article over a date range via the Wikimedia metrics REST API, no key. Returns one record per day with timestamp and view count. For AI agents measuring topic popularity and attention trends.
descriptionBazaar: Daily pageview counts for an English Wikipedia article over a date range via the Wikimedia metrics REST API, no key. One record per day with timestamp and view count. For agents measuring topic popularity trends.

title: Wikipedia Top Articles By Day
description: Top viewed English Wikipedia articles for a given day via the Wikimedia metrics REST API, no key. Returns up to 1000 articles ranked by daily view count. For AI agents tracking what the world is reading and trending topics.
descriptionBazaar: Top viewed English Wikipedia articles for a day via the Wikimedia metrics REST API, no key. Up to 1000 articles ranked by daily view count. For agents tracking trending topics and what the world is reading.

title: Wikipedia New Pages Created Daily
description: Count of new content pages created on English Wikipedia per day over a date range via the Wikimedia metrics REST API, no key. Returns one record per day with timestamp and new page count. For AI agents tracking encyclopedia growth and editing activity.
descriptionBazaar: Count of new content pages created on English Wikipedia per day over a date range via the Wikimedia metrics REST API, no key. One record per day with timestamp and new_pages count. For agents tracking editing activity.

title: Wikidata Entity Lookup
description: Structured Wikidata entity data for a given Q-id via the Wikidata API, no key. Returns labels, descriptions, aliases, claims, and sitelinks for the entity. For AI agents resolving entities to canonical facts and cross-language labels.
descriptionBazaar: Structured Wikidata entity data by Q-id via the Wikidata API, no key. Returns labels, descriptions, aliases, claims, and sitelinks. For agents resolving entities to canonical facts and cross-language labels.

ids.description: One or more Wikidata Q-ids, pipe-separated

title: Words With Similar Meaning
description: Words and phrases with a meaning similar to a given word via the keyless Datamuse API. Returns ranked results with relevance scores and part-of-speech tags. For AI agents expanding concepts, building thesauri, and improving query recall.
descriptionBazaar: Words with a meaning similar to a given word via the keyless Datamuse API. Ranked results with relevance scores and part-of-speech tags. For agents expanding concepts and building thesauri.

ml.description: Word or phrase to find similar meanings for

title: Rhyming Words
description: Perfect rhymes for a given word via the keyless Datamuse API. Returns ranked rhyming words with frequency scores and syllable counts. For AI agents writing poetry, lyrics, slogans, and rhyme-based content.
descriptionBazaar: Perfect rhymes for a given word via the keyless Datamuse API. Ranked rhyming words with frequency scores and syllable counts. For agents writing poetry, lyrics, and slogans.

title: Synonyms
description: Synonyms for a given word via the keyless Datamuse API. Returns ranked synonyms with frequency scores. For AI agents rewriting text, varying vocabulary, and building synonym maps.
descriptionBazaar: Synonyms for a given word via the keyless Datamuse API. Ranked synonyms with frequency scores. For agents rewriting text, varying vocabulary, and building synonym maps.

title: Antonyms
description: Antonyms (opposites) for a given word via the keyless Datamuse API. Returns ranked opposite words with frequency scores. For AI agents handling negation, contrast, and sentiment polarity.
descriptionBazaar: Antonyms (opposites) for a given word via the keyless Datamuse API. Ranked opposite words with frequency scores. For agents handling negation, contrast, and sentiment polarity.

title: Translate Between Any Language Pair
description: Machine translation between any two languages via the keyless MyMemory free tier, with explicit source and target codes. Returns the translated text plus alternative matches with quality scores. For AI agents translating arbitrary language pairs.
descriptionBazaar: Machine translation between any two languages via the keyless MyMemory free tier, with explicit source and target codes. Returns translated text plus alternative matches. For agents translating arbitrary pairs.

langpair.description: Source and target ISO 639-1 codes joined by a pipe, e.g. de|en

title: Words That Sound Like
description: Words that sound similar to a given word or spelling via the keyless Datamuse API. Returns ranked phonetic matches with scores and syllable counts. For AI agents correcting misspellings and handling homophones.
descriptionBazaar: Words that sound similar to a given word or spelling via the keyless Datamuse API. Ranked phonetic matches with scores and syllable counts. For agents correcting misspellings and handling homophones.

sl.description: Word or phonetic spelling to match by sound

title: NOAA Tide Predictions (High/Low)
description: Predicted high and low tides for a NOAA CO-OPS tidal station for today, with time, height, and type (H/L). Keyless NOAA Tides & Currents.
descriptionBazaar: Predicted high/low tides for a NOAA CO-OPS station today: time, height (ft), and type (H/L). Keyless NOAA Tides and Currents. For agents planning coastal, boating, fishing, or surf activity.

title: NOAA Observed Water Level
description: Observed water level (tide gauge) readings for today at a NOAA CO-OPS station, sampled at 6-minute intervals with quality flags.
descriptionBazaar: Observed tide-gauge water levels for today at a NOAA CO-OPS station, 6-minute samples with sigma and quality flags. Keyless NOAA Tides and Currents. For agents monitoring real-time coastal water levels.

title: NOAA Sea Water Temperature
description: Observed sea water temperature for today at a NOAA CO-OPS station (where the sensor is offered), at 6-minute intervals.
descriptionBazaar: Observed sea water temperature for today at a NOAA CO-OPS station, 6-minute samples. Keyless NOAA Tides and Currents. For agents tracking ocean/bay water temperature. Not all stations carry this sensor.

station.description: NOAA CO-OPS station id with a water-temperature sensor

title: NOAA Coastal Wind Observations
description: Observed wind speed, direction, and gusts for today at a NOAA CO-OPS coastal station, at 6-minute intervals.
descriptionBazaar: Observed coastal wind speed, direction (deg + compass), and gusts for today at a NOAA CO-OPS station, 6-minute samples. Keyless NOAA Tides and Currents. For agents planning sailing, boating, or coastal operations.

title: NOAA Tidal Current Predictions
description: Predicted tidal current velocities for today at a NOAA CO-OPS current station, with mean flood/ebb direction, depth, and major-axis velocity.
descriptionBazaar: Predicted tidal current speed (knots) and direction for today at a NOAA CO-OPS current station, with mean flood/ebb bearing and depth. Keyless NOAA Tides and Currents. For agents routing vessels through tidal currents.

title: NOAA Tide Station Metadata
description: Metadata for a single NOAA CO-OPS station: name, location, tidal/great-lakes flags, and links to datums, sensors, and flood levels.
descriptionBazaar: Metadata for one NOAA CO-OPS tide station: name, lat/lon, tidal and Great Lakes flags, SHEF code, and references to its datums and sensors. Keyless NOAA Tides and Currents. For agents resolving station details.

title: NOAA Tide Stations Directory
description: Directory of NOAA CO-OPS stations of a given type (e.g. water levels, currents), with ids, names, locations, and reference links.
descriptionBazaar: Directory of NOAA CO-OPS stations by type (waterlevels, currents, etc.) with ids, names, and locations. Keyless NOAA Tides and Currents. For agents discovering which tide/current stations exist near a location.

title: Ocean Wave Forecast (Hourly)
description: Hourly marine wave forecast for a lat/lon: significant wave height, period, direction, plus wind-wave and swell components, from Open-Meteo Marine.
descriptionBazaar: Hourly ocean wave forecast for a coordinate: significant wave height, period, direction, plus wind-wave and swell components. Keyless Open-Meteo Marine. For agents planning surfing, sailing, or offshore operations.

title: Ocean Wave Daily Summary
description: Daily marine wave summary for a lat/lon: maximum wave height, maximum wave period, and dominant wave direction, from Open-Meteo Marine.
descriptionBazaar: Daily ocean wave summary for a coordinate: max wave height, max period, and dominant direction. Keyless Open-Meteo Marine. For agents planning multi-day coastal trips or surf windows.

title: Aviation METAR (Current Conditions)
description: Latest decoded METAR for one or more ICAO airport ids: wind, visibility, temperature, altimeter, clouds, flight category, and raw report.
descriptionBazaar: Latest decoded METAR for ICAO airport id(s): wind, visibility, temp/dewpoint, altimeter, clouds, flight category (VFR/IFR), and raw text. Keyless aviationweather.gov. For agents checking real-time airport weather.

ids.description: One or more ICAO ids, comma-separated

sampleResponse.rawOb: METAR KJFK 200151Z 30015G25KT 10SM FEW070 SCT120 SCT250 25/07 A2973

title: Aviation TAF (Terminal Forecast)
description: Latest Terminal Aerodrome Forecast (TAF) for one or more ICAO airport ids: validity window, forecast periods, wind, visibility, and clouds, with raw text.
descriptionBazaar: Latest TAF terminal aerodrome forecast for ICAO airport id(s): validity window and forecast periods with wind, visibility, and clouds, plus raw text. Keyless aviationweather.gov. For agents forecasting airport conditions.

ids.description: One or more ICAO ids, comma-separated

title: Aviation PIREPs (Pilot Reports)
description: Recent pilot reports (PIREPs) near an airport: aircraft type, flight level, location, and reported icing, turbulence, cloud, and weather conditions.
descriptionBazaar: Recent pilot reports (PIREPs) near an airport: aircraft type, flight level, position, and reported icing, turbulence, sky, and weather. Keyless aviationweather.gov. For agents assessing in-flight hazards along a route.

id.description: ICAO airport id to center the search on

title: Aviation AIRMET/SIGMET Advisories
description: Active AIRMET and SIGMET advisories: hazard type, validity window, altitude band, movement, and raw advisory text, from aviationweather.gov.
descriptionBazaar: Active AIRMET/SIGMET advisories: hazard type (convective, turbulence, icing), validity window, altitude band, movement, and raw text. Keyless aviationweather.gov. For agents avoiding hazardous airspace in flight planning.

title: Islamic Prayer Times by City/Address
description: Daily Islamic prayer timings (Fajr, Sunrise, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha and more) for any city or address, using a configurable calculation method. Keyless Aladhan API.
descriptionBazaar: Daily Islamic prayer times (Fajr, Sunrise, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha, Imsak, Midnight) for any city or address with a configurable calculation method. Keyless Aladhan. For agents building prayer reminders or schedules.

address.description: City, address or place name to resolve

title: Islamic Prayer Times by Coordinates
description: Daily Islamic prayer timings for a specific date and latitude/longitude using a configurable calculation method. Keyless Aladhan API.
descriptionBazaar: Islamic prayer times for an exact date and lat/lng with configurable method. Returns Fajr, Sunrise, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha. Keyless Aladhan. For agents needing precise location-based salah schedules.

title: Qibla Direction from Coordinates
description: Compute the Qibla (direction to the Kaaba in Mecca) in degrees from any latitude/longitude. Keyless Aladhan API.
descriptionBazaar: Qibla compass direction in degrees toward the Kaaba from any lat/lng. Keyless Aladhan. For agents building prayer-direction or compass features.

title: Quran Ayah (Verse) by Number
description: Fetch a single Quran ayah (verse) by its global number in a chosen edition/translation (e.g. en.asad English, quran-uthmani Arabic). Keyless Al Quran Cloud API.
descriptionBazaar: Single Quran ayah by global verse number in any edition/translation (en.asad, quran-uthmani, etc). Keyless Al Quran Cloud. For agents quoting or studying scripture.

data.text: GOD - there is no deity save Him, the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsistent Fount of All Being.

title: Quran Surah (Chapter) by Number
description: Fetch a full Quran surah (chapter) with all its ayahs in a chosen edition/translation. Keyless Al Quran Cloud API.
descriptionBazaar: Full Quran surah (chapter) with every ayah in any edition/translation (en.asad, quran-uthmani, etc). Includes English name, revelation type, ayah count. Keyless Al Quran Cloud. For agents reading or analyzing scripture.

title: 99 Names of Allah (Asma al-Husna)
description: The 99 names of Allah (Asma al-Husna) with Arabic, transliteration and English meaning. Keyless Aladhan API.
descriptionBazaar: The 99 Names of Allah (Asma al-Husna) with Arabic script, transliteration and English meaning. Keyless Aladhan. For agents building Islamic reference or devotional content.

title: Bible Verse / Passage Lookup
description: Look up any Bible verse or passage by reference (e.g. 'John 3:16', 'Romans 8:28-30') in a chosen translation. Keyless Bible API.
descriptionBazaar: Any Bible verse or passage by reference (John 3:16, Romans 8:28-30) in a chosen public-domain translation (web, kjv). Returns book, chapter, verse and text. Keyless bible-api.com. For agents quoting scripture.

verses.text: For God so loved the world...

title: Random Bible Verse
description: Return a random Bible verse from a chosen translation, useful for verse-of-the-day or daily inspiration features. Keyless Bible API.
descriptionBazaar: A random Bible verse from a chosen public-domain translation (web, kjv). Returns book, chapter, verse and text. Keyless bible-api.com. For agents building verse-of-the-day or daily devotional features.

random_verse.text: Now Jesus stood before the governor...

title: Gregorian to Hijri Date Conversion
description: Convert a Gregorian calendar date to the Islamic Hijri date, including weekday, month names (Arabic/English) and any associated Islamic holidays. Keyless Aladhan API.
descriptionBazaar: Convert a Gregorian date to the Islamic Hijri calendar with day, month (Arabic+English), year and Islamic holidays. Keyless Aladhan. For agents handling Islamic dates and calendars.

title: Hijri to Gregorian Date Conversion
description: Convert an Islamic Hijri calendar date to the Gregorian date, including weekday and month names. Keyless Aladhan API.
descriptionBazaar: Convert an Islamic Hijri date to the Gregorian calendar with day, month and weekday. Keyless Aladhan. For agents converting Islamic dates to civil dates.

title: Monthly Prayer Times Calendar
description: Full month of daily Islamic prayer timings for a given year/month and latitude/longitude using a configurable calculation method. Keyless Aladhan API.
descriptionBazaar: A full month of daily Islamic prayer times for given year/month and lat/lng with configurable method. Each day lists Fajr, Sunrise, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha plus Hijri date. Keyless Aladhan. For agents building monthly prayer calendars.

title: Gregorian to Hebrew Date Conversion
description: Convert a Gregorian calendar date to the Hebrew calendar date, including Hebrew year/month/day, Hebrew script and the week's Torah portion. Keyless Hebcal converter.
descriptionBazaar: Convert a Gregorian date to the Hebrew calendar with Hebrew year, month, day, Hebrew script and the week's Torah portion (parashah). Keyless Hebcal. For agents handling Jewish dates.

title: People Currently In Space
description: Real-time list of all people currently in space and the spacecraft they are aboard, with a total count. Powered by the keyless Open Notify API.
descriptionBazaar: Live list of everyone currently in space and their craft, with total count. Keyless Open Notify API. For agents reporting current human spaceflight.

title: Near-Earth Close Approaches
description: Near-Earth object close approaches within a date and distance range, with object designation, close-approach date, nominal distance, relative velocity and magnitude. Powered by the keyless NASA/JPL SBDB Close Approach Data API.
descriptionBazaar: Near-Earth asteroid close approaches by date and distance: designation, date, distance, velocity, magnitude. Keyless NASA/JPL CAD API. For planetary-defense agents.

dist-max.description: Maximum approach distance in astronomical units

title: Atmospheric Fireball Events
description: Recent atmospheric fireball (bolide) events detected by US government sensors, with date, total radiated energy, calculated impact energy, latitude, longitude, altitude and velocity. Powered by the keyless NASA/JPL Fireball Data API.
descriptionBazaar: Recent atmospheric fireball events: date, radiated energy, impact energy, lat, lon, altitude, velocity. Keyless NASA/JPL Fireball API. For agents tracking bolides.

limit.description: Maximum number of fireball records to return

title: Asteroid Impact Risk List
description: Sentry impact-risk monitoring list of near-Earth asteroids with a non-zero probability of Earth impact, including designation, impact probability, Palermo scale value, diameter, magnitude and risk year range. Powered by the keyless NASA/JPL Sentry API.
descriptionBazaar: Asteroid impact-risk list: designation, impact probability, Palermo scale, diameter, magnitude, risk years. Keyless NASA/JPL Sentry API. For planetary-defense agents.

title: Human-Accessible Asteroids (NHATS)
description: Near-Earth objects identified as candidates for human spaceflight missions, with designation, orbit ID, magnitude, size, minimum delta-v and mission duration. Powered by the keyless NASA/JPL NHATS API.
descriptionBazaar: Human-accessible near-Earth asteroids: designation, size, min delta-v, mission duration, observation windows. Keyless NASA/JPL NHATS API. For mission-planning agents.

title: Newly Discovered NEO Tracking (Scout)
description: Scout near-real-time hazard assessment for recently discovered near-Earth object candidates not yet in the catalog, with provisional designation, sky position, magnitude, hazard scores and observation arc. Powered by the keyless NASA/JPL Scout API.
descriptionBazaar: Newly found near-Earth object candidates with sky position, magnitude, NEO and hazard scores, observation arc. Keyless NASA/JPL Scout API. For sky-survey agents.

title: Moon Phases by Date
description: Upcoming primary Moon phases (New, First Quarter, Full, Last Quarter) starting from a given date, with the phase name and exact date and time. Powered by the keyless US Naval Observatory Astronomical Applications API.
descriptionBazaar: Upcoming primary Moon phases from a date: New, First Quarter, Full, Last Quarter with exact date and time. Keyless US Naval Observatory API. For astronomy agents.

nump.description: Number of upcoming phases to return

title: Equinoxes Solstices and Apsides
description: Astronomical seasons for a given year: equinoxes, solstices, plus Earth perihelion and aphelion, each with phenomenon name and exact date and time. Powered by the keyless US Naval Observatory Astronomical Applications API.
descriptionBazaar: Equinoxes, solstices, perihelion and aphelion for a year with exact date and time. Keyless US Naval Observatory API. For agents computing astronomical seasons.

title: Solar Eclipses by Year
description: Solar eclipses occurring in a given year, each with event description (type and date) and calendar date. Powered by the keyless US Naval Observatory Astronomical Applications API.
descriptionBazaar: Solar eclipses in a given year with event type and date. Keyless US Naval Observatory API. For agents tracking eclipse calendars and observation planning.

title: Sun and Moon Rise Set Times
description: Sun and Moon rise, set, transit and twilight times for a given date and location, plus current Moon phase, illumination fraction and closest upcoming phase. Powered by the keyless US Naval Observatory Astronomical Applications API.
descriptionBazaar: Sun and Moon rise, set, transit and twilight times for a date and location, plus Moon phase and illumination. Keyless US Naval Observatory API. For astronomy agents.

title: Local and Greenwich Sidereal Time
description: Apparent and mean sidereal time at Greenwich and at a given location for a specified date and universal time, including GAST, GMST, LAST, LMST and the equation of the equinoxes. Powered by the keyless US Naval Observatory Astronomical Applications API.
descriptionBazaar: Greenwich and local apparent and mean sidereal time (GAST, GMST, LAST, LMST) for a date, time and location. Keyless US Naval Observatory API. For astronomy agents.

title: ISS Orbital Telemetry
description: Real-time orbital telemetry for the International Space Station including latitude, longitude, altitude, velocity, visibility, ground footprint and solar position. Powered by the keyless Where The ISS At API.
descriptionBazaar: Live ISS orbital telemetry: lat, lon, altitude, velocity, visibility, footprint, solar position. Keyless Where The ISS At API. For agents tracking the station orbit.
